addons.name: Back Cover Copy Polish
addons.description: Professional refinement of your back cover or retailer description copy to improve hook, clarity, and market appeal.

addons.name: US Market Localization
addons.description: Adapts spelling, idioms, and cultural references to US English and the US book market, including terminology and measurements.

addons.name: Priority Turnaround Upgrade
addons.description: Expedites your project to the front of the queue, typically reducing the standard turnaround time by 30–40%.

addons.name: Query Letter Critique
addons.description: Detailed editorial feedback and line edits on one query letter or pitch email aimed at agents or publishers.

addons.name: Front & Back Matter Review
addons.description: Checks your acknowledgments, dedication, copyright page, and other front/back matter for consistency and professionalism.

coupons.description: Save 10% on eligible editing and formatting services.
25% off your first full editing package for new authors.
15% discount on all standalone formatting services.

editors.name: Ryan Cole
editors.bio: Ryan specializes in science fiction and fantasy novels, focusing on pacing, worldbuilding, and structural clarity. He has worked with both indie and traditionally published authors.

editors.name: Maya Chen
editors.bio: Maya is a line and copy editor with a background in linguistics. She specializes in character-driven science fiction and contemporary romance.

editors.name: Samira Khan
editors.bio: Samira offers developmental editing for memoir and non-fiction, with an emphasis on structure, narrative drive, and author voice.

editors.name: Julian Morales
editors.bio: Julian is a copy editor and proofreader with a focus on business books and thought leadership titles, including APA and Chicago styles.

editors.name: Nora Lesh
editors.bio: With a background in publishing production, Nora specializes in paperback and ebook formatting for non-fiction and academic titles.

editors.name: Alexander Hughes
editors.bio: Alexander focuses on epic fantasy and historical fiction, helping authors with deep structural revisions and series planning.

editors.name: Claire Fontaine
editors.bio: Claire is a romance and women’s fiction editor who excels at line editing for voice, style, and emotional pacing.

editors.name: Daniel Okafor
editors.bio: Daniel works on science fiction, cyberpunk, and technothrillers, combining technical accuracy with narrative momentum.

editors.name: Elena Popov
editors.bio: Elena edits translated non-fiction and academic work, ensuring clarity and consistency in English while respecting the author’s voice.

editors.name: Hannah Ross
editors.bio: Hannah is a memoir and narrative non-fiction specialist, providing both structural feedback and detailed style suggestions.

editors.name: Isaac Brown
editors.bio: Isaac focuses on fast-turnaround proofreading for genre fiction, particularly romance, mystery, and sci-fi novellas.

editors.name: Lena Martinez
editors.bio: Lena is a bilingual editor offering copyediting and localization for business and marketing books targeting US and Latin American markets.

editors.name: Oliver Gray
editors.bio: Oliver specializes in formatting complex non-fiction books, including heavy front/back matter, indexes, and reference sections.

editors.name: Priya Singh
editors.bio: Priya edits crossover fiction and YA, with strengths in line editing for style and sensitivity review for diverse casts.

editors.name: Tobias Lee
editors.bio: Tobias provides both developmental and copyediting services for hard sci-fi and space opera, with a strong focus on scientific plausibility.

service_components.name: Line Editing
service_components.description: Sentence-level editing focusing on clarity, flow, style, and consistency while preserving the author’s voice.

service_components.name: Print Formatting
service_components.description: Interior layout for paperback or hardcover, including margins, headers/footers, page numbers, and trim-size-appropriate design.

service_components.name: eBook Formatting
service_components.description: Responsive ebook formatting for Kindle, Apple Books, and other major retailers, including table of contents and basic styling.

service_components.name: Structure Feedback Add-on
service_components.description: High-level editorial report on structure, pacing, and chapter flow, designed to pair with copyediting or proofreading.

service_components.name: Style Suggestions & Consistency Check
service_components.description: Targeted style notes, word choice recommendations, and consistency checks for terminology and character details.

service_products.name: Standard Proofreading
service_products.description: Final-pass proofreading for spelling, punctuation, grammar, and obvious formatting glitches. Ideal as the last step before publication for both fiction and non-fiction.

service_products.name: Comprehensive Copyediting
service_products.description: In-depth copyediting that covers grammar, sentence structure, style, clarity, and basic structural feedback on paragraph and scene flow.

service_products.name: Comprehensive Developmental Editing
service_products.description: High-level manuscript critique with detailed editorial letter covering structure, pacing, character arcs, and market positioning, plus targeted margin comments.

service_products.name: Starter Copyedit Package
service_products.description: Entry-level package combining copyediting and basic style polish for shorter manuscripts up to 50,000 words.

service_products.name: Essentials Full Editing Package
service_products.description: Complete line and copy edit plus structural feedback for genre fiction manuscripts. Includes an editorial summary and two rounds of author questions.

service_products.name: Premium Full Editing & Consultation
service_products.description: Advanced full editing package combining developmental editing, line editing, and copyediting plus a one-hour consultation call.

service_products.name: Build-Your-Own Editing & Formatting Package
service_products.description: Combine line editing, proofreading, and print/ebook formatting components into a single custom package tailored to your book and budget.

service_products.name: Standard Paperback Formatting
service_products.description: Professional interior layout for trade paperback, including clean chapter breaks, custom chapter headings, and full front & back matter setup.

service_products.name: Premium Paperback Formatting
service_products.description: Enhanced paperback formatting with custom chapter designs, ornamental scene breaks, and highly polished front & back matter layout.

service_products.name: Non-fiction Formatting Bundle
service_products.description: Formatting bundle tailored for non-fiction and business books, including clear hierarchy for headings, callouts, and comprehensive front & back matter layout for both print and ebook.

service_products.name: Business Book Copyediting (US English, APA)
service_products.description: Copyediting for business, marketing, and thought-leadership titles in US English, with attention to APA-style citations and references.

service_products.name: Standard eBook Formatting
service_products.description: Clean and responsive ebook formatting for major retailers, including clickable table of contents, chapter breaks, and properly styled front & back matter.

service_products.name: Standalone Line Editing
service_products.description: Sentence-level line edit focusing on rhythm, clarity, and voice, ideal for authors who already have solid story structure and want polished prose.

recommended_packages.label: Non-fiction Formatting Bundle (Most Popular)
recommended_packages.description: Tailored for non-fiction and business authors who need both print and ebook layouts with clear hierarchy and professional front/back matter.

recommended_packages.label: Standard Paperback Formatting
recommended_packages.description: Recommended for straightforward fiction and memoir paperbacks up to 40,000 words, including custom chapter headings and full front/back matter setup.

recommended_packages.label: Premium Paperback Formatting
recommended_packages.description: For authors who want more design flourishes in their print interiors, with enhanced chapter designs and ornamental scene breaks.

recommended_packages.label: Essentials Full Editing Package
recommended_packages.description: A balanced full-editing option for fiction manuscripts that combines line, copy, and structural feedback at a mid-range price.

recommended_packages.label: Business Copyediting (US English, APA)
recommended_packages.description: Ideal for business and thought-leadership titles requiring APA-aligned copyediting and citation checks.

recommended_packages.label: Standard Proofreading
recommended_packages.description: Best for authors who need a final quality check on grammar, punctuation, and typos before publication.

testimonials.testimonial_text: The non-fiction formatting bundle made my leadership book look indistinguishable from a major publisher release. Headings, callouts, and the index are all beautifully handled.
I needed clean layouts for charts, sidebars, and case studies. The team nailed both the paperback and ebook versions, and the front matter looks incredibly professional.
My memoir includes pull quotes and photo sections, and the non-fiction formatting bundle handled everything with care. The chapter openers and back matter are exactly what I hoped for.
Turnaround was quick and the final layouts were spot on for both paperback and Kindle. Highly recommend this non-fiction formatting package.
The standard paperback formatting gave my romance novella beautiful custom chapter headings and polished front/back matter, all within my budget.
I chose the premium paperback formatting for my fantasy debut. The decorative scene breaks and chapter designs really reinforce the worldbuilding.
The ebook formatting is flawless on every device I tested. The clickable table of contents and clean headings make it easy to navigate.
They caught a shocking number of small errors in what I thought was a clean manuscript. The standard proofreading service was worth every penny.
Fast turnaround and very thorough. The proofreader respected my voice while fixing every typo and comma issue.
The Essentials Full Editing Package gave me structural guidance, line edits, and copy edits in one go. It transformed my fantasy manuscript.
The comprehensive copyediting service tightened my prose, clarified the tech jargon, and flagged several pacing issues I hadn’t noticed.

testimonials.manuscript_type: US business book with APA citations
testimonials.testimonial_text: They cleaned up my language and ensured my references met APA expectations. The editor also caught several inconsistencies in terminology.
The developmental edit letter was incredibly detailed. It gave me a clear, step‑by‑step plan to fix structure, character arcs, and worldbuilding holes.
The line edit was exactly what I needed: my voice is intact, but the sentences are sharper, more vivid, and far more consistent.
I used the custom package builder to combine line editing with both print and ebook formatting. The team helped me stay within budget and the results look fantastic.
